svg.title: 360° Customer Signals Repository Flowchart
svg.desc: Flowchart showing Grain, HubSpot, Zendesk, and Slack feeding via Zapier into a central Airtable repository, accessible by the whole team.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How would Grain feed into Airtable?')
sendPrompt('How would HubSpot feed into Airtable?')
sendPrompt('How would Zendesk feed into Airtable?')
sendPrompt('How would Slack feed into Airtable?')
sendPrompt('How does Zapier automate the routing into Airtable?')
g.text: Normalize · tag · attach Customer ID · route

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What would the Airtable repository look like?')
sendPrompt('Who on the team would use the Airtable repository?')
g.text: Team access — search by account name
